lines.raw: Lesson 113 | 第113课
Small change | 零钱

lines.english: Listen to the tape then answer this question.
lines.chinese: 听录音，然后回答这个问题。
lines.raw: Listen to the tape then answer this question. | 听录音，然后回答这个问题。

lines.english: Who has got some small change?
lines.raw: Who has got some small change? | 谁有零钱？
Fares, please! | 请买票！
Trafalgar Square, please. | 请到特拉法尔加广场。
I'm sorry, sir. | 对不起，先生。

lines.english: I can't change a ten-pound note.
lines.chinese: 我没法找开这张十英镑的钞票。
lines.raw: I can't change a ten-pound note. | 我没法找开这张十英镑的钞票。

lines.english: Haven't you got any small change?
lines.raw: Haven't you got any small change? | 你没有零钱吗？
I've got no small change, | 我没有零钱，
I am afraid. | 恐怕是这样。

lines.english: I'll ask some of the passengers.
lines.raw: I'll ask some of the passengers. | 我去问问其他乘客。

lines.english: Have you any small change, sir?
lines.raw: Have you any small change, sir? | 先生，您有零钱吗？
I'm sorry. | 对不起。
I've got none. | 我没有。
I haven't got any either. | 我也没有。

lines.english: Can you change this ten-pound note, madam?
lines.chinese: 女士，您能找开这张十英镑的钞票吗？
lines.raw: Can you change this ten-pound note, madam? | 女士，您能找开这张十英镑的钞票吗？
I'm afraid I can't. | 恐怕我不能。
Neither can I. | 我也不能。
I'm very sorry, sir. | 我非常抱歉，先生。

lines.english: You must get off the bus.
lines.raw: You must get off the bus. | 您必须下车。

lines.english: None of our passengers can change this note.
lines.chinese: 我们没有一个乘客能找开这张钞票。
lines.raw: None of our passengers can change this note. | 我们没有一个乘客能找开这张钞票。
They're all millionaires! | 他们都是百万富翁！
Except us. | 除了我们。
I've got some small change. | 我有一些零钱。
So have I. | 我也有。
